message:
fix: agent.mjs bugs, add container tests, update design doc

- Fix agent.mjs: remove await import() in sync function, use top-level
  readdirSync import, add snapshot restore on boot before listening
- Add 5 container integration tests: status endpoint, non-builtin
  fallback, index invalidation (valid/invalid/bad body)
- Update container-design.md to match actual ctx.container API
  (not separate Container DO class)
- Decision log updated with final implementation choices
